news.title: China Evergrande liquidators enter exclusive talks to sell majority stake in property services arm
news.para: China Evergrande ​Group once embodied its name, rising to become the country's premier property developer and floating in Hong Kong in 2009 in the largest listing by a Chinese private developer.

news.title: Lucknow development body plans to ‘convert’ its low-rise buildings into modern high-rises
news.para: LDA Vice-chairperson Prathamesh Kumar on Monday directed officials to prepare detailed redevelopment proposals. In the first phase, plans will cover residential blocks on Wazir Hasan Road in Hazratganj, along with schemes in Paper Mill Colony and Sector-G of the Kanpur Road Scheme.

news.title: Listed hotel firms to add over 70,000 rooms by 2030: Report
news.para: India’s hospitality sector is entering a growth phase, with listed hotel operators expected to expand capacity significantly amid rising domestic travel, improving occupancies and increased investor interest.

news.title: Capacit’e, NCC bag ₹933 crore construction contracts from Great Value Realty, BPTP
news.para: Capacit’e Infraprojects and NCC have secured construction contracts worth over ₹900 crore from developers Great Value Realty and BPTP for residential projects in Noida and Gurugram.

news.title: Phoenix Mills: The workplace is no longer real estate; It is economic infrastructure
news.para: Phoenix Mills is redefining the modern workplace in India by developing integrated commercial ecosystems. Their Grade A office assets, embedded within mixed-use destinations, prioritize work, lifestyle, connectivity, and community. This strategic approach aims to enhance productivity, organizational culture, and long-term competitiveness for businesses and urban centers.

news.title: CBI searches in eight states in builders-financial institutions nexus case
news.para: The CBI conducted searches at 77 locations across eight states in a builders-financial institutions nexus case. This investigation, handed over by the Supreme Court, targets builders accused of duping homebuyers through subvention schemes and an alleged nexus with banks. The searches are part of ongoing efforts to address widespread fraud in real estate projects.

news.title: China Evergrande's founder pleads guilty to fraud in Shenzhen court
news.para: Hui Ka Yan and China Evergrande Group also face ​charges of illegally extending loans, fraudulently issuing securities and bribery by units, ⁠the the Shenzhen ‌Municipal Intermediate People's Court added, with verdicts to be handed down later, though it ​did not ​set a date.

news.title: Waste charges stall Bengaluru apartments' property tax payments
news.para: Bengaluru apartment dwellers are delaying property tax payments due to confusion over solid waste management charges.  Complexes generating over 100kg of waste daily are eligible for exemption but face a complex declaration process. Residents lack data on waste generation and fear penalties for incorrect submissions, urging authorities for clearer guidelines and a simplified system.

news.title: Indore civic body gets cracking on illegal colonies, 16 row houses razed
news.para: The crackdown primarily focused on Zone 4. In Anjani Nagar, four row houses illegally constructed near a drain were completely removed, while at Jagdish Nagar in Banganga area, removal operations targeted 12 row houses. Officials revealed that six of them were nearly complete with finishing work underway, while the remaining six were under construction.

news.title: Shree Cement bullish on demand outlook, capacity addition: Chairman
news.para: Despite rising costs from global crises, Shree Cement is expanding, aiming for 80 MTPA. Chairman HM Bangur highlighted the company's strong position and gradual price adjustments.  He noted a shift in consumer preference towards premium cement, driven by evolving expectations and India's economic growth fueling housing and infrastructure demand.

news.title: No capital gains if flat's sale price equals purchase cost: ITAT
news.para: The Income Tax Appellate Tribunal ruled that no capital gains tax applies when a property's sale price equals its purchase cost. The tribunal allowed a taxpayer's appeal, deleting a Rs 42.5 lakh addition by the tax department. This decision was based on the identical purchase and sale values and a similar ruling in the co-owner's case.

news.title: Gurugram: 10 years on, plot not handed over, Vatika told to pay ₹62 lakh compensation
news.para: Allotees Vinay Kumar and Shalini Kumari booked a residential plot measuring 240 square yards in the developer's project 'Vatika India Next' located in Sector 85 in 2010. The total consideration value of the unit was recorded at Rs 62.7 lakh, with possession contractually promised by July 27, 2013.

news.title: SIT to probe MHADA quota irregularities in Nashik: Maharashtra minister
news.para: A special investigation team will probe alleged irregularities in Nashik's MHADA quota implementation. The probe will focus on developers who failed to reserve land for economically weaker sections. Those found responsible for defrauding the government will face action. The SIT will submit its report within one month. This action aims to ensure the poor receive their rightful housing.

news.title: ED raids Gurugram-based 32nd Avenue in ₹500 crore 'fraud'
news.para: Authorities raided seven premises linked to the entity named 32nd Avenue. The group operates in Delhi-NCR and Goa, the officials said.

news.title: Existing home sales in USA hit nine-month low in March, rising mortgage rates cloud outlook
news.para: Home sales dropped 3.6% last month to a seasonally adjusted annual rate of 3.980 million units, the lowest level since June 2025. Economists polled by Reuters had forecast home ​resales easing to a rate of 4.06 million units.

news.title: NCLAT adjourns hearing on Vedanta plea against selection of Adani's bid for JAL
news.para: The NCLAT adjourned Vedanta's challenge against Adani Enterprises' bid for Jaiprakash Associates to April 16. Vedanta questioned the lenders' valuation metrics, claiming they undermined commercial wisdom. The tribunal's decision on Adani's Rs 14,535-crore bid is subject to the outcome of Vedanta's appeals.

news.title: Jharkhand housing board cancels trade licenses in residential colonies
news.para: Traders in Ranchi's Bariatu and Argora housing colonies face livelihood concerns following a Supreme Court order for municipal bodies to survey residential areas used for commercial purposes. The Jharkhand State Housing Board is requesting the cancellation of trade licenses, citing violations of residential allotment conditions.

news.title: Retail leasing in top seven Indian cities touch 4.3 million sq ft in H2 2025: Report
news.para: Retail leasing remained steady in the second half of 2025, with high-street locations witnessing stronger traction and rental growth due to limited availability of quality mall space.

news.title: China court orders bankruptcy liquidation for Zhongzhi Group and 316 affiliates
news.para: The Beijing court has taken a decisive action by ordering the liquidation of Zhongzhi Enterprise Group and its extensive network of over 300 affiliates. This step seeks to tackle one of the most substantial collapses in the realm of China's shadow banking. Creditors are urged to file their claims by June 10.

news.title: How BuilderOpedia is using AI to transform real estate CRM in 2026
news.para: Introducing BuilderOpedia, where cutting-edge AI meets the real estate world, redefining how property transactions unfold. Acknowledged by the Economic Times, this intelligent CRM augments client engagement and streamlines operations. Industry analysts predict that by 2026, over 60% of real estate agencies will embrace AI-enhanced CRMs.
